meta.title: Live Demo — GateCtr
meta.description: See GateCtr in action. Paste a prompt, watch it get compressed, routed, and measured in real-time. No account required.

hero.headline: See exactly what GateCtr does.
hero.description: Paste any prompt. GateCtr compresses it, picks the right model, and shows you the real savings.
hero.trust: Your API key is used once. Never stored. Never logged.

playground.keyTrustNote: Used for this request only. Never stored. Never logged.
playground.sandboxNote: No key? We cover this request. 3 free calls/hour.
playground.sandboxModelNote: Sandbox uses GPT-5.4 nano. Add your key to choose any model.
playground.inputPlaceholder: Paste any prompt — a system message, a user query, anything you'd send to an LLM...
playground.quotaExhausted: Limit reached. Sign up for unlimited access.
playground.emptyState: Paste a prompt and run it through GateCtr.
playground.emptyStateSub: Token savings, model routing, and cost — all measured in real-time.

tokens.ctaHeadline: {saved} tokens saved on this request. -{pct}% on every call.
tokens.ctaSub: This happens automatically. No code changes.

errors.tooShort: Prompt too short. Write at least a few words.
errors.invalidApiKey: Invalid API key format. Check your key and try again.
errors.quotaExceeded: Demo limit reached (10 req/hour). Sign up for unlimited access.
errors.sandboxQuotaExceeded: Sandbox limit reached (3 req/hour). Add your API key for 10 req/hour, or sign up.
errors.sandboxUnavailable: Sandbox is temporarily unavailable. Add your OpenAI key to continue.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. Try a shorter prompt.
errors.network: Request failed. Check your connection and try again.

cta.headline: This happens on every request. In production.
cta.description: Connect GateCtr in 5 min. Your prompts compressed, models routed, budget enforced — automatically.
cta.trust: No credit card required · Setup in 5 min
